sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Leitung nuntakna, khat vei leh nopna,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A hoihna kiamlo ki khel lo,
Hong itna zing nisuak bang hi,
Topa hih theihna ki ciangtan lo.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Galilee gamah Zeisu hong vak lai
Misi thosak hi, miphak damsak hi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lunggim mi ading lungnopna om hi,
En in na mai-ah thupha nak om hi,
Na up na muan gamzah nang aa
